item.title: From the chaos of snowboard cross, a repeat champ.
item.description: Alessandro Hämmerle of Austria came from behind to claim another gold medal in the men’s event.

item.title: Ukrainian Olympian Is Disqualified Over Helmet Honoring War Dead
item.description: Olympic officials ruled that Vladyslav Heraskevych’s helmet violated a prohibition on political speech, setting off outrage at the Winter Games in Ita...

item.title: Olympic Figure Skaters Are on Thin Ice Over Music Copyright Rules
item.description: Some Olympic athletes have found themselves caught up in controversies over musical choices before and during one of the biggest competitions of their...

item.title: Tumbler Ridge Shooting: What to Know About the Victims and Suspect
item.description: The police identified an 18-year-old as the suspect believed to have fatally shot eight people in Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia, before killing hers...

item.title: Across Italy, the Winter Olympic Vibes Are Very Different
item.description: In Milan, the hub of the Winter Games, the atmosphere seems subdued, while the small towns hosting mountain events are seeing enthusiastic crowds.
